title: Just Enough Chromium
description: Adds Chromium ore, powerful tools, and a unique cave biome to explore!
body:
### 🚨THIS IS MY FIRST MOD IN MINECRAFT YOU CAN EXPECT BUGS!🚨

### IF YOU WANNA REPORT BUGS MY DISCORD NAME: mr.whiteiron

 
### Just Enough Chromium is a comprehensive technology and exploration mod that brings a versatile new material to your Minecraft world: Chromium. From deep underground ores to unique dimension, this mod expands your endgame experience with a sleek, metallic touch.

## Main Features:
 

⛏️ New Resources: Discover Chromium Ore in the depths of your world. Process it into Piece of Chromium and refine it for high-tech crafting.
![Chromium Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ac881ac6533cd698f7ab465402c6a3c803d2adc.png)
 

🧪 The Laboratory: Explore procedurally generated secret laboratories. Uncover the lore of metallic experiments and find rare loot.
![Chromium Lab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8185ec216e88fd0bb81a9c4249ef1ff11c2f013.png)
 

🏭 Chromium Foundry: A dedicated workstation for advanced smelting and alloy processing (New features coming soon!).
![Chromium Foundry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e5ad2a5df51d1be6ba8ec15810a777299245161.png)
 

🛡️ Gear Up: Craft the durable Chromium Armor set and The Chromium Tools. 
![Chromium Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c87af57f30a206df301007af4a982e5420170e0.png)
 

🏗️ Building Blocks: Use Chromium to decorate your base with new metallic Stairs, Slabs, Walls, Buttons and also with chromium woods
![Chromium Wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46c1ece54c8c85503ce0d13facb9e9aafa4e750e.png)
 

💧 New Environment and Dimension: Encounter Chromium Dripstones in the caves, adding a unique industrial vibe to your underground explorations and a unique chromium dimension biomes
![Chromium Desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c41a6e0e0a162f23ee5a0e63bfb281766a891c7c.png)
![Metallic Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dc78b3b2729b0ca2687cd8dd142eedc4c2ad685.png)

 
Progression & Achievements:
Follow the custom advancement tree to master the mod:

🏆 Metallic echoes: Discover the Chromium Cavern

🏆 Why this tastes chromium?: Consume the Chromium Apple

🏆 Chromium Age: Obtain the first Chromium Gem

🏆 World Of Chromium: Enter to Chromium Dimension

# Note: This mod is currently in active development. Stay tuned for more updates, including complex machinery, liquid chromium mechanics, and new metallic entities!
